# `agentic-alz` CLI reference

Generated by invoking `agentic-alz <cmd> --help`. The CLI exposes the deterministic stages of the pipeline; LLM stages are exercised through the orchestrator runtime.

## (root)

```
Usage: agentic-alz [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...

  Agentic ALZ — GitOps pipeline orchestrator for Azure Landing Zones.

Options:
  --version                       Show the version and exit.
  --log-level [DEBUG|INFO|WARNING|ERROR]
                                  [default: INFO]
  --help                          Show this message and exit.

Commands:
  generate         Render the Terraform working directory for the given...
  judge            Aggregate per-model verdicts into a build-time...
  models           List allowlisted frontier models for a stage role.
  risk             Compute the risk report for a Terraform plan.
  tf-policy        Evaluate a Terraform CLI argv against the v1 safety...
  validate-inputs  Validate an inputs.yaml against...
```

## `agentic-alz validate-inputs`

```
Usage: agentic-alz validate-inputs [OPTIONS] PATH

  Validate an inputs.yaml against schemas/inputs.schema.json.

Options:
  --help  Show this message and exit.
```

## `agentic-alz generate`

```
Usage: agentic-alz generate [OPTIONS]

  Render the Terraform working directory for the given inputs.

Options:
  --inputs FILE    [required]
  --out DIRECTORY  [required]
  --help           Show this message and exit.
```

## `agentic-alz risk`

```
Usage: agentic-alz risk [OPTIONS]

  Compute the risk report for a Terraform plan.

Options:
  --plan-json FILE                Terraform `terraform show -json plan.tfplan`
                                  output.  [required]
  --env [sandbox|platform|workload]
                                  [default: platform]
  --infracost-delta-usd FLOAT     [default: 0.0]
  --help                          Show this message and exit.
```

## `agentic-alz tf-policy`

```
Usage: agentic-alz tf-policy [OPTIONS] ARGV...

  Evaluate a Terraform CLI argv against the v1 safety policy.

Options:
  --override  Permit destructive subcommands. CI-only.
  --help      Show this message and exit.
```

## `agentic-alz judge`

```
Usage: agentic-alz judge [OPTIONS] VERDICTS_PATH

  Aggregate per-model verdicts into a build-time consensus report.

  The input file is JSON in the shape documented at
  `orchestrator.agentic_alz.llm.judge.from_json`. The orchestrator does NOT
  call models from this command — caller fans out to allowlisted models and
  records their structured verdicts.

Options:
  --required-pass-votes INTEGER   Pass threshold per criterion. Default =
                                  unanimous.
  --role [design|drift_triage|firewall_compose|judge]
                                  [default: judge]
  --help                          Show this message and exit.
```

## `agentic-alz models`

```
Usage: agentic-alz models [OPTIONS]

  List allowlisted frontier models for a stage role.

Options:
  --role [design|drift_triage|firewall_compose|interview|judge]
                                  [required]
  --help                          Show this message and exit.
```
